response.justification: The candidate brings 10+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering with genuine high-scale, low-latency experience (microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby) and a strong software-craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 specializing in growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis work — the core differentiators for this position. Titles top out at Staff, with no evidence of cross-org architectural leadership at principal scope. A strong generalist, but a weak match for the experimentation specialization.
strengths: High-scale, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of req/sec)
Broad multi-language background incl. Java, C#, C/C++, JS/TS
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, teaching
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No demonstrated telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work
Highest title is Staff; principal-level cross-org leadership not evidenced
